title: VMware India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: VMware India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
